title: Molten Roasted Syrian Yam Gratin
description: A creamy, keto-friendly gratin that combines roasted Syrian yams with a rich, cheese-based sauce, perfect for a cold winter's day.
instructions: Peel the Syrian yams and slice them into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, combine the yam slices, melted butter, salt, and black pepper. Toss to coat.
Transfer the yam mixture to a baking dish and set aside.
In a small saucepan, combine the heavy cream and grated Parmesan cheese. Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Stir in the Manteca cream and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Pour the cheese sauce over the yam mixture and top with additional grated Parmesan cheese, if desired.
Place the raclette grill on the lowest setting and cook the gratin for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the gratin from the grill and sprinkle with minced garlic. Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley, if desired.
